title: Internal Error: ../V3Width.cpp:2957: InitArray type not assigned by AstPattern/Var visitor

features.name: function returning unpacked array type
features.description: Code should include a function with automatic lifetime that returns an unpacked array type
features.snippet: function automatic int s_is_t [N_P_IS-1:0] gen_s_is(bit reverse); endfunction

features.name: unpacked array typedef with computed size
features.description: Code should include a typedef of an unpacked array where the array size is a computed expression involving parameters
features.snippet:
localparam int N_P_IS = (N_IS / 2) - (N_IS_PER_S - 1);
typedef int s_is_t [N_P_IS-1:0];

features.name: localparam assigned from function returning unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a localparam that is assigned from a function call where the function returns an unpacked array type

features.name: unpacked array passed to module parameter
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an unpacked array is passed as a parameter argument
